title: Job
description: Row in `state_jobs`. Non-terminal state until it reaches `completed` or `failed`, at which point an `ExecutionRecord` is also written.

actionVersion.description: Semver of the action implementation at submit time. Frozen for this job.

nodeId.description: Target `node.path`. `--all` submissions fan out into one job per node.

contentHash.description: sha256(actionId + actionVersion + bodyHash + frontmatterHash + promptTemplateHash). Duplicate detection key.

nonce.description: Unique per-job token. `sm record` requires it to close the job — mismatch rejects with exit code 4.

status.description: Lifecycle state. See `dispatch-lifecycle.md` for allowed transitions.

ttlSeconds.description: Resolved TTL at submit time: max(expectedDurationSeconds × graceMultiplier, minimumTtlSeconds). Frozen.

filePath.description: Relative path to the rendered job file (usually `.skill-map/jobs/<id>.md`). Null before rendering.

finishedAt.description: Unix ms. Null while not terminal.

expiresAt.description: Derived = claimedAt + ttlSeconds × 1000. Used by auto-reap. Null while queued.

submittedBy.description: Free-form: username, CI job id, or `skill:<skill-id>`. Optional provenance.
